creator: rick@lgarchitecture.com
text:
It has been a year since the issue was opened and the updated driver 
doesn't appear to have made it into FBSD 7.
I don't understand what the problem is.  We've been running this patch 
on production systems for a long time now without any issues.  At the 
very least, forget the multicard patch and update the base driver to 
v1.14 from Highpoint's website please.

Does anybody even look at this?
